name: @jchoi2x/typst-ts-web-compiler
description: WASM module for Compiling Typst documents in JavaScript environment.
author: Myriad-Dreamin

scripts.build:node: CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_OPT_LEVEL=z CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_LTO=fat CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_CODEGEN_UNITS=1 CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_PANIC=abort wasm-pack build --target nodejs --scope jchoi2x -- --no-default-features --features web,misc
scripts.build: CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_OPT_LEVEL=z CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_LTO=fat CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_CODEGEN_UNITS=1 CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_PANIC=abort wasm-pack build --target web --scope jchoi2x -- --no-default-features --features web,misc && node ../tools/wasm-debundle.mjs
scripts.build:with-fonts: CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_OPT_LEVEL=z CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_LTO=fat CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_CODEGEN_UNITS=1 CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_PANIC=abort wasm-pack build --target web --scope jchoi2x -- --no-default-features --features web,fonts,misc && node ../tools/wasm-debundle.mjs
scripts.build:pdf-only: CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_OPT_LEVEL=z CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_LTO=fat CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_CODEGEN_UNITS=1 CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_PANIC=abort wasm-pack build --target web --scope jchoi2x -- --no-default-features --features web,pdf && node ../tools/wasm-debundle.mjs
